test.name: FamilySearch wiki — marriage records
test.description: User asks how to find marriage records on FamilySearch. Exercises the core workflow with a common record type.

input.user_message: Search the FamilySearch wiki for how to find marriage records for my ancestors

judge_context: Should call wiki_search with a natural-language query about finding marriage records
Summary should explain where marriage records are held and how to search them on FamilySearch
Should not invent information the wiki did not provide — all claims must be traceable to the returned chunk_text
